user.title: Energy Planner
user.description: Click Submit to create the Planner Hub. Add energy, climate, EV, and Enphase inputs from the integration page after setup.

data_description.amber_import_price_entity: Sensor that exposes current and forecast grid import prices.
data_description.amber_export_price_entity: Sensor that exposes current and forecast feed-in prices.
data_description.pv_forecast_entity: Sensor that exposes solar production forecast data.
data_description.baseline_load_forecast_entity: Sensor that exposes household baseline load forecast data.
data_description.enphase_profile_entity: Select entity used to read and change the current Enphase system profile.
data_description.enphase_ai_profile: Profile name to restore when planner ownership ends, normally AI Optimisation.
data_description.enphase_self_consumption_profile: Profile name used when the planner wants the battery to serve local load or export, normally Self-Consumption.
data_description.enphase_full_backup_profile: Profile name used when the planner wants to charge or preserve the battery, normally Full Backup.
data_description.daikin_climate_entity: Climate entity the planner may control after active mode is enabled.
data_description.daikin_power_entity: Optional power sensor used for HVAC thermal-model learning.
data_description.climate_automation_entities: Automation entities to pause during planner HVAC control.
data_description.climate_change_from_scheduler_entity: Optional input_boolean that marks scheduler-owned climate changes.
data_description.climate_manual_override_entity: Optional input_boolean used to expose a manual HVAC override.
data_description.climate_target_low_entity: Input number containing the occupied low comfort target.
data_description.climate_target_high_entity: Input number containing the occupied high comfort target.
data_description.person_entities: Person entities used to infer occupied or away state.
data_description.ev_charging_entity: Optional entity that reports whether the EV is charging.
data_description.ev_connected_entity: Optional entity that reports whether the EV is plugged in.
data_description.ev_smart_charging_entity: Legacy single EV Smart Charging control, if separate start and stop controls are not used.
data_description.ev_smart_charging_start_entity: Switch, button, input_boolean, or input_button used to start EV Smart Charging.
data_description.ev_smart_charging_stop_entity: Switch, button, input_boolean, or input_button used to stop EV Smart Charging.
data_description.ev_smart_charging_target_soc_entity: Optional number helper used to set EV target SOC.
data_description.ev_smart_charging_ready_by_entity: Optional time, input_datetime, or text helper used for EV ready-by time.
data_description.ai_advisor_service: Optional response-capable local AI advisory service.
data_description.weather_entity: Optional weather entity used for outdoor temperature forecasts.

error.entity_not_found: Entity was not found in Home Assistant.
error.invalid_entity_domain: Entity domain is not supported for this field.
error.invalid_unit: Entity unit is not compatible with this field.
error.invalid_service_name: Service name must use domain.service format.
error.service_not_found: Service was not found in Home Assistant.

user.title: Energy
user.description: Configure tariff, forecast, and battery inputs.

data_description.amber_import_price_entity: Sensor that exposes current and forecast grid import prices.
data_description.amber_export_price_entity: Sensor that exposes current and forecast feed-in prices.
data_description.pv_forecast_entity: Sensor that exposes solar production forecast data.
data_description.baseline_load_forecast_entity: Sensor that exposes household baseline load forecast data.

user.title: Climate
user.description: Configure climate control, weather context, and comfort targets.

data_description.daikin_climate_entity: Climate entity the planner may control after active mode is enabled.
data_description.daikin_power_entity: Optional power sensor used for HVAC thermal-model learning.
data_description.weather_entity: Optional weather entity used for outdoor temperature forecasts.
data_description.climate_automation_entities: Automation entities to pause during planner HVAC control.
data_description.climate_change_from_scheduler_entity: Optional input_boolean that marks scheduler-owned climate changes.
data_description.climate_manual_override_entity: Optional input_boolean used to expose a manual HVAC override.
data_description.climate_target_low_entity: Input number containing the occupied low comfort target.
data_description.climate_target_high_entity: Input number containing the occupied high comfort target.

user.title: Presence
user.description: Configure household presence inputs used for comfort and EV planning.

data_description.person_entities: Person entities used to infer occupied or away state.

user.title: Enphase
user.description: Configure Enphase profile monitoring and profile control.

data_description.enphase_profile_entity: Select entity used to read and change the current Enphase system profile.
data_description.enphase_ai_profile: Profile name to restore when planner ownership ends, normally AI Optimisation.
data_description.enphase_self_consumption_profile: Profile name used when the planner wants the battery to serve local load or export, normally Self-Consumption.
data_description.enphase_full_backup_profile: Profile name used when the planner wants to charge or preserve the battery, normally Full Backup.

profiles.title: Enphase Profiles
profiles.description: Choose the Enphase system profile used for each planner action.

data_description.enphase_ai_profile: Profile restored when planner ownership ends.
data_description.enphase_self_consumption_profile: Profile used when the planner wants the battery to serve local load or export.
data_description.enphase_full_backup_profile: Profile used when the planner wants to charge or preserve the battery.

user.title: AI
user.description: Configure the optional local AI advisory service. Prefer an AI task provider when one is available; it is designed for background data-generation tasks and is the most reliable option for Energy Planner. Use a conversation agent only as a fallback when your AI integration does not expose an AI task entity.

data_description.ai_task_entity: Preferred. Select an AI Task entity for advisory JSON generation. Energy Planner calls ai_task.generate_data and validates the response before using it.
data_description.ai_agent_id: Fallback. Select a conversation agent only if no AI Task entity is available. Conversation agents are built for chat/voice responses, so Energy Planner has to parse their text output.

user.title: EV
user.description: Configure EV state and smart-charging controls.

data_description.ev_charging_entity: Optional entity that reports whether the EV is charging.
data_description.ev_connected_entity: Optional entity that reports whether the EV is plugged in.
data_description.ev_smart_charging_entity: Legacy single EV Smart Charging control, if separate start and stop controls are not used.
data_description.ev_smart_charging_start_entity: Switch, button, input_boolean, or input_button used to start EV Smart Charging.
data_description.ev_smart_charging_stop_entity: Switch, button, input_boolean, or input_button used to stop EV Smart Charging.
data_description.ev_smart_charging_target_soc_entity: Optional number helper used to set EV target SOC.
data_description.ev_smart_charging_ready_by_entity: Optional time, input_datetime, or text helper used for EV ready-by time.

init.title: Planner policy
init.description: Choose a policy section to edit.

schedule.title: Scheduling
schedule.description: Set the planning window and fallback EV ready-by time.

data_description.planning_horizon_hours: How many hours ahead each planning run evaluates.
data_description.planning_interval_minutes: Size of each planning slot in minutes. Smaller intervals give finer control but create more forecast slots.
data_description.default_ready_by: Fallback local time used when no EV ready-by helper value is configured.

ev_battery_grid.title: EV, battery, and grid
ev_battery_grid.description: Set battery reserve, EV charging assumptions, and grid power limits.

data_description.battery_min_soc_percent: Minimum home battery state of charge the planner tries to preserve.
data_description.ev_min_soc_percent: Lowest EV state of charge the planner treats as acceptable before charging is prioritised.
data_description.ev_max_soc_percent: Upper EV state of charge limit used when planning smart charging.
data_description.ev_fallback_target_soc_percent: EV target used when trip history or a ready-by target is unavailable.
data_description.ev_charge_rate_kw: Assumed EV charging power used for schedule projections.
data_description.ev_soc_per_kwh: Estimated EV battery percentage gained from each kWh added.
data_description.grid_import_limit_kw: Maximum grid import power allowed in planned actions.
data_description.grid_export_limit_kw: Maximum grid export power allowed in planned actions.

climate.title: Climate
climate.description: Set comfort tolerance, HVAC price triggers, and manual override behavior.

data_description.occupied_temperature_tolerance_percent: Allowed comfort-band widening while the home is occupied.
data_description.hvac_suppression_min_price_delta: Minimum price difference before the planner suppresses HVAC usage.
data_description.hvac_precondition_lead_minutes: How far ahead HVAC may precondition before an expensive or comfort-sensitive period.
data_description.hvac_precondition_min_price_delta: Minimum price difference required before HVAC preconditioning is considered worthwhile.
data_description.hvac_min_cycle_minutes: Minimum time between planner HVAC mode changes.
data_description.manual_hvac_override_minutes: How long manual HVAC changes block planner-owned HVAC control.

enphase.title: Enphase
enphase.description: Set Enphase profile hold time and the savings threshold for profile ownership.

data_description.enphase_profile_min_hold_minutes: Minimum time to keep an Enphase profile before changing it again.
data_description.enphase_minimum_savings: Minimum estimated daily savings required before the planner takes Enphase profile ownership.

ai_safety.title: AI and safety
ai_safety.description: Control active mode, dry-run behavior, AI advice, and command cooldowns.

data_description.planner_enabled: Turns on planner-owned device control. Leave off until preflight and dry-run behavior are reviewed.
data_description.dry_run: When enabled, the planner records decisions without calling device-control services.
data_description.ai_enabled: Allows the configured AI conversation agent to provide bounded advice. AI advice cannot directly command devices.
data_description.ev_control_enabled: Allows active-mode EV start, stop, and schedule commands after production is armed.
data_description.climate_control_enabled: Allows active-mode climate commands after production is armed.
data_description.enphase_control_enabled: Allows active-mode Enphase profile changes after production is armed.
data_description.ai_timeout_seconds: Maximum time to wait for local AI advice before continuing without it.
data_description.command_rate_limit_seconds: Cooldown between repeated commands to the same device target.
data_description.max_daily_ev_actions: Maximum EV control attempts allowed in a rolling 24-hour window. Set to 0 for no cap.
data_description.max_daily_climate_actions: Maximum climate control attempts allowed in a rolling 24-hour window. Set to 0 for no cap.
data_description.max_daily_enphase_actions: Maximum Enphase profile control attempts allowed in a rolling 24-hour window. Set to 0 for no cap.

data_health.title: Data health
data_health.description: Set freshness windows and the threshold for material plan changes.

data_description.price_freshness_minutes: Maximum age for price inputs before they are treated as stale.
data_description.forecast_freshness_minutes: Maximum age for forecast inputs before they are treated as stale.
data_description.material_change_threshold_percent: Minimum plan-change percentage before a new plan is considered materially different.

priorities.title: Planning priorities
priorities.description: Choose the objective order used to compare otherwise valid plans.

data_description.planning_priority_1: Highest-priority objective used when comparing otherwise valid plans.
data_description.planning_priority_2: Second objective used when the first objective does not decide the plan.
data_description.planning_priority_3: Third objective used as a tie-breaker.
data_description.planning_priority_4: Fourth objective used as a tie-breaker.
data_description.planning_priority_5: Fifth objective used as a tie-breaker.
data_description.planning_priority_6: Lowest-priority objective used last when comparing plans.

error.ev_min_above_max: EV minimum SOC must not be above EV maximum SOC.
error.ev_fallback_outside_bounds: EV fallback target SOC must be between the configured minimum and maximum SOC.
error.invalid_ready_by: Default ready-by must be a valid local time.
error.invalid_priority_weights: Each planning priority must use a different objective.
